title: Capesize futures surge as the Atlantic market comes back roaring
section_path: Capesize futures surge as the Atlantic market comes back roaring
section_path_text: Capesize futures surge as the Atlantic market comes back roaring
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2020-06-16_capesize-futures-surge-as-the-atlantic-market-comes-back-roaring_img_image-asset_da8729e3150a.jpeg
A mad day in freight futures today , as improving spot rates across the globe and better sentiment in macroeconomic fundamentals (see infrastructure spending ) pushed freight futures higher, aided by significant short covering of bearish bets made earlier in the year. As the spot Capesize market is repeating its year ago pattern (with a brief interruption in May), and with significant volume expected out of Brazil in the second half of the year , physical players seem to have been caught short freight (i.e. not enough chartered-in vessels to ship the anticipated higher volume), rushing into the futures market to take cover.
